required_preferences.fact: Temporarily avoids all physical therapy exercises at home, following doctor’s orders, until cleared to resume after her course of medication

supersedes.fact: Completes physical therapy exercises daily at home, even on weekends — never skips due to busy workdays

required_preferences.fact: Now spends most weekday evenings in live online business classes or class project meetings; video chats with her partner briefly after class when possible, in-person time limited to weekends.

supersedes.fact: Spends quality evening time in person with her partner most nights — video chats only when one of them is away

required_preferences.fact: Makes Sunday morning calls to her parents without fail — never skips even if traveling
Commutes by light rail each weekday morning — uses the time for reading or podcast listening rather than driving or walking.
Takes three dedicated 10-minute outdoor light exposure breaks during workdays and immediately after work, regardless of weather, as prescribed therapy for tension headaches
Keeps a scrapbook of travel destinations she manages for sales reps — never documents her own trips

persona: A 28-year-old office administrator supporting a remote sales team
